title: tephroseris pseudocrispa
intro: Tephroseris pseudocrispa, also known as the alpine cineraria or hairy tephroseris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Tephroseris pseudocrispa often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
